name: insurance-premium-engine
description: Dynamic insurance premium calculator with rule engine

scripts.start:all: concurrently -n gateway,plans,rules,quotes -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "cd api-gateway && npm run start:dev" "cd plan-service && npm run start:dev" "cd rule-engine && npm run start:dev" "cd quote-service && npm run start:dev"
scripts.install:all: cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../plan-service && npm install && cd ../rule-engine && npm install && cd ../quote-service && npm install
